final_verdict: Generic non-high-symmetry in-plane angles are not promoted to broadly supported truth modes by Task N. The dense scan records which raw angles are robust, caution-required, or unstable under explicit matching, smoothness, and tolerance-sensitivity thresholds.

restricted_supported_domain.truth_mode_recommendation: Use canonical in-plane high-symmetry modes as truth modes. Treat generic raw in-plane angles as diagnostic/caution-only unless an angle satisfies the robust thresholds in this scan.
